title: cerastium obtusifolium
intro: Cerastium obtusifolium, also known as the blunt-leaved mouse-ear chickweed or short-podded mouse-ear, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cerastium obtusifolium include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
